changeSet.author: howners
changeSet.comment: Insert sample properties for test owners
changeSet.sql:
INSERT INTO properties (id, owner_id, name, property_type, address_line1, city, postal_code, department, country, surface_area, bedrooms, bathrooms, description, created_at, updated_at) VALUES ( 'a0000002-0000-0000-0000-000000000001', (SELECT id FROM users WHERE email = 'owner2@howners.test'), 'T2 Paris 15e', 'APARTMENT', '22 rue de la Convention', 'Paris', '75015', '75', 'FR', 42.00, 1, 1, 'Appartement T2 calme au 5eme etage avec ascenseur. Vue degagee, proche metro Convention.', NOW(), NOW() );
INSERT INTO properties (id, owner_id, name, property_type, address_line1, city, postal_code, department, country, surface_area, bedrooms, bathrooms, description, created_at, updated_at) VALUES ( 'a0000002-0000-0000-0000-000000000002', (SELECT id FROM users WHERE email = 'owner2@howners.test'), 'Villa Versailles', 'HOUSE', '15 avenue de Saint-Cloud', 'Versailles', '78000', '78', 'FR', 180.00, 5, 3, 'Magnifique villa bourgeoise proche chateau de Versailles. Jardin paysager, piscine, double garage.', NOW(), NOW() );
